speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: But who did bid thee join with us?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: He needs not our mistrust, since he delivers

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: Our offices and what we have to do

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: The west yet glimmers with some streaks of day.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: Now spurs the lated traveler apace

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: To gain the timely inn, and near approaches

speaker: BANQUO
text: Give us a light there, ho!

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: That are within the note of expectation

speaker:
THIRD
               
              MURDERER
text: Almost a mile; but he does usually

speaker:
THIRD
               
              MURDERER
text: (So all men do) from hence to th’ palace gate

speaker: BANQUO
text: O treachery! Fly, good Fleance, fly, fly, fly!

speaker:
THIRD
               
              MURDERER
text: Who did strike out the light?

speaker:
THIRD
               
              MURDERER
text: There’s but one down. The son is

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: We have lost best half of our

speaker:

              MURDERER
text: Well, let’s away and say how much is done.
